notes: Core mechanics are solid with proper alien marching, shields, mystery ship, waves, and lives, but alien sprites are rudimentary pixel blocks rather than classic Space Invaders shapes, and the single-bullet limit plus occasional fast alien fire can feel punishing.
An excellent, highly polished implementation of Space Invaders with accurate mechanics, great pixel-art style rendering, smooth controls, and proper difficulty scaling.

A solid and mostly complete Space Invaders clone, but strict scoring is warranted because firing is single-shot only, pause/resume via Escape can awkwardly jump from START to PAUSED to PLAYING, and some classic behaviors/polish are simplified.
